issues.description: Evidence gathering aborted with status 'partial_honesty_abort' - all verification fields (tests, independent_tests, coverage_details, plan_audit, bdd, arch_review) are null. No independent evidence available to verify acceptance criteria.
issues.suggestion: Investigate why evidence gathering aborted during honesty verification. Resolve the gathering abort and re-run the turn to obtain independent test verification, coverage metrics, and quality gate results.

issues.description: Honesty verification found critical discrepancy: Player claimed files 'tests/integration/test_metadata_filter.py, tests/integration/test_concurrent_writes.py' that do not exist on disk (path_exists=False). Additionally, 4 files listed in completion_promises.implementation_files were not actually modified this turn, creating inconsistency with the main report fields (files_modified=[], files_created=[]).
issues.suggestion: Align completion_promises.implementation_files with actual files modified/created. If work was delegated to task-work agents, ensure the reporting schema correctly reflects delegation vs direct implementation.

issues.description: Advisory shows task-work invoked 2 of 3 expected agents, missing Phase 3 (Implementation specialist).
issues.requirement: Complete agent chain for stack-specific quality
issues.suggestion: Consider invoking the Phase 3 implementation specialist to strengthen verification coverage.

rationale: Cannot approve due to GATHERING-STATUS GUARD: evidence_bundle.gathering_status='partial_honesty_abort' (not 'complete'). All verification fields are null, constituting ABSENT SIGNAL per absence-of-failure guards. Without independent test verification, coverage metrics, or quality gate results, I have no basis to verify any acceptance criteria. The honesty discrepancies (1 critical, 4 should_fix) suggest reporting structure issues. The Player's delegation approach may be valid, but evidence gathering must complete successfully before approval is possible.
